shortDescription: Modern 1-bedroom suite in North York with premium finishes and full building amenities.
fullDescription: Welcome to 33 Sheppard Avenue East, Unit 1510 in the vibrant North York neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The 1 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
